nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)
nodes.summary: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联50种鸟类，包括红耳鸭、斑头雁、鬃林鸭等50种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: White-eared honeyeater
nodes.summary: White-eared honeyeater（White-eared honeyeater，学名 Nesoptilotis leucotis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)、澳大利亚，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|White-eared honeyeater thumb|White-eared honeyeater The white-eared honeyeater (Nesoptilotis leucotis) is a medium-sized honeyeater found in Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|White-eared honeyeater thumb|White-eared honeyeater The white-eared honeyeater (Nesoptilotis leucotis) is a medium-sized honeyeater found in Australia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The white-eared honeyeater's preferred habitat is in forests, woodlands, heathlands, mallee and dry inland scrublands. A eucalyptus canopy, rough bark and a shrub layer are the most important requirements for white-eared honeyeaters

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although the white-eared honeyeater has a decreasing population, it has an extensive distribution, and is considered to be of least concern on the IUCN Red List. Threats to the white-eared honeyeater include habitat degradation, fire and loss of understory
